title: bupleurum protractum var. heterophyllum
intro: Bupleurum protractum var. heterophyllum is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family, and is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Bupleurum protractum var. heterophyllum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, and promote liver health. Bupleurum protractum var. heterophyllum is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture in traditional Chinese medicine, and is also used in modern herbal supplements.
